headline: Tech Guru's Green Empire Built on Unpaid Labor!
subtext: "Eco-conscious" billionaire exposed for massive tax fraud and exploiting global workforce.
celebrity_description: A clean-cut, sharp-featured man in his late 40s, with silver-streaked dark hair, piercing blue eyes, and an always-present confident smirk. He often wears bespoke eco-friendly suits.
story_summary: Alden Vance, CEO of the seemingly ethical tech giant 'Solara Systems', has been caught funneling billions into offshore shell corporations to avoid taxes, while simultaneously drastically underpaying his global network of gig economy workers. His public image of sustainability and worker welfare is a sham, funded by immense wealth inequality, leaving countless families struggling.
image_prompt: A high-contrast, dramatic photo of Alden Vance, a clean-cut man in his late 40s with silver-streaked dark hair and piercing blue eyes. He's wearing a sleek, dark suit, with a subtle, almost menacing smirk. Behind him, a blurred backdrop shows a lavish, minimalist modern office and faint, ghostly outlines of fatigued gig workers hunched over keyboards in a dark, distant setting. Intense, accusatory lighting with deep shadows. Viral news style, embodying betrayal and corporate ruthlessness.
